CustomField.description: Internal field to track if Credit Memo was approved at the time of Payable creation. [LOAD:No] [JUSTIFICATION:Stores True if associated Payable's CM is Approved, False if its not Approved] [REPLACEMENT OBJECT API:NA] [REPLACEMENT FIELD API:NA] [COMMENTS:NA]
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Internal field to track if Credit Memo was approved at the time of Payable creation.
CustomField.label: _Payable Linked CM Approved
